metadata.source: Web search data (Trustpilot, G2, official pricing pages)
metadata.note: tp = Trustpilot rating, g2 = G2 rating, tpCount = review count on Trustpilot

providers.name: Webshare
providers.desc: Budget-friendly proxy provider with 80M+ rotating residential IPs, 500K+ datacenter IPs, 99.7% uptime. Trusted by 64,000+ customers.

providers.name: IPRoyal
providers.desc: Fast and reliable residential proxy network with 32M+ IPs across 195+ countries. Pay-as-you-go pricing, non-expiring traffic, 98.8% success rate.

providers.name: Bright Data
providers.desc: Leading web data infrastructure platform trusted by 25,000+ organizations. Premium provider focused on enterprise with managed scraping solutions and advanced features.

providers.name: Geonode
providers.desc: Budget proxy provider with 30M+ residential IPs. Known for 80% cost savings vs competitors. Unlimited bandwidth plans available. Excellent Trustpilot rating.

providers.name: Oxylabs
providers.desc: Premium enterprise provider with 175M+ residential IPs, 99.99% rotating DC success rate, sophisticated AI-powered routing. Best for high-volume operations.

providers.name: Rayobyte
providers.desc: Leading enterprise proxy provider with 40M+ residential IPs. Offers residential, ISP, datacenter, and mobile proxies. Strong for B2B scraping.

providers.name: NetNut
providers.desc: Fast residential proxy network with 20M+ static and rotating IPs. One-hop ISP connectivity for stable sessions. Excellent G2 rating.

providers.name: Decodo
providers.desc: Formerly Smartproxy. Offers 115M+ residential IPs with 10M+ mobile IPs. Best for SMBs. Includes scraping APIs. 99.86% success rate.

providers.name: DataImpulse
providers.desc: Budget-friendly provider with 90M+ ethically-sourced IPs from 195 countries. Non-expiring traffic. Smallest entry fee $5 for 5GB.

providers.name: Infatica
providers.desc: Web scraping and data collection tool. Simple API-first approach. Works with major parsing solutions. Low entry barrier.

providers.name: Packetstream
providers.desc: P2P residential proxy network. Affordable but less reliable than centralized providers. Users can earn money sharing bandwidth. 50GB minimum purchase.

providers.name: MarsProxies
providers.desc: High-quality affordable proxies optimized for SMBs and personal use. Fast and reliable solutions for automation and scraping.

providers.name: Geonode
providers.desc: Leading budget residential proxy supplier. 30M+ IPs. Industry-leading pricing and responsive support. Unlimited bandwidth plans.

providers.name: Flashproxy
providers.editor: Very reliable proxy provider, cheaper than most competition
providers.desc: FlashProxy is a premium proxy infrastructure provider known for its massive scale and ethical sourcing. With a network of over 95 million unique IPs spanning 190+ countries, it offers one of the largest and most reliable proxy pools in the market today.

providers.name: ScrapFly
providers.desc: Web scraping API with built-in proxy management, JavaScript rendering, and CAPTCHA handling. No-code scraping available.

providers.name: ProxyEmpire
providers.desc: Residential and mobile proxy solutions across 170+ countries. Powerful targeting without extra costs. Ethically sourced IPs.

providers.name: Proxy-Seller
providers.desc: Private SOCKS5 and HTTPS proxies. Residential, ISP, IPv4, IPv6, and Mobile 4G/5G/LTE proxies. Works with games, social networks, and scraping.

providers.name: Proxy-cheap
providers.desc: Enterprise-level proxies for budget-conscious users. Good for data scraping and market research at scale.

providers.name: NodeMaven
providers.desc: Intelligently rotating residential and datacenter proxies. Ideal for scraping reviews at scale without interruptions.

providers.name: LiveProxies
providers.desc: Advanced proxy services with rotating residential, static residential, and mobile proxies. Trusted by broad client base.

providers.name: Byteful
providers.desc: High-quality reliable proxies with excellent customer service. Customers praise stability and effectiveness.

providers.name: Crawlbase
providers.desc: Leading crawling and scraping platform. APIs built on millions of rotating proxies worldwide.

providers.name: Proxy4U
providers.desc: Reliable high-performance proxies for data scraping and task automation. Customizable solutions with global access.

providers.name: Proxyscrape
providers.desc: Wide range of proxy services from premium subscription to residential and dedicated datacenter proxies. Unlimited bandwidth on datacenter plans.

providers.name: Froxy
providers.desc: Smart proxy service with proxies from all countries. Detailed geo-targeting, automatic rotation, user-friendly dashboard.

providers.name: Storm Proxies
providers.desc: Reliable user-friendly residential and datacenter proxies at affordable prices. Limited review history.

providers.name: Zenrows
providers.desc: Web Scraping API with rotating proxies, headless browsers, and CAPTCHA handling. No code required.

providers.name: HypeProxies
providers.desc: Dedicated proxy solutions for consistent performance. Designed for long-term stable access and reliable monitoring.

providers.name: Evomi
providers.desc: Top-quality residential proxies with ethical sourcing and transparency. Committed to integrity and security.

providers.name: PYProxy
providers.desc: Proxy service for data-related businesses. Used for brand protection, SEO, and web scraping.

providers.name: Astro Proxies
providers.desc: High-quality performant IPv6 and IPv4 proxies. Limited review base but competitive pricing.
